name: Chicken Barley Soup (Low Cal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, water, and celery leaves along with the small onion in a large saucepan. Set aside the celery stalks.
2. Cover the saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 1/2 hours until the chicken is tender.
3. Remove the chicken and strain the broth into a bowl. Let it cool until the fat solidifies on top, then remove the fat.
4. Discard the skin and bones from the chicken. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
5. Return the broth to the saucepan. Add the reserved celery stalks chopped with the onion, carrot, parsley, barley, lemon juice, and seasonings. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Add the green beans and remaining chicken. Continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes or until the beans are tender. Each serving is approximately 1 1/2 cups.
